    Description

    PotConnector
    PotSlide.addConnector(PotConnector.ConnectorType connectorType)
    Adds a new connector shape to the slide with a specified connector type.
    PotConnector

    Adds a new straight connector between two elements.

    PotConnector

    Connects the start of this connector to another shape element.
    PotConnector

    Connects the end of this connector to another shape element.
    PotConnector
    PotConnector.dash(PotBorder.DashStyle dashStyle)
    Sets the dash style of the connector line.
    PotConnector
    PotConnector.duplicate()
    Creates a duplicate of this connector on the same slide.
    PotConnector
    PotConnector.endArrow(PotConnector.ArrowType arrowType)
    Sets the arrowhead style at the end of the connector.
    PotConnector

    Sets the arrowhead style and dimensions at the end of the connector.

    Sets the starting point of the connector, preserving the current end point.
